anglophone.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary

anglophone.title: Supreme Court rules that prison guards can't be sued for shaving Rastafarian's head
anglophone.excerpt: The Supreme Court ruled that a Louisiana prisoner whose dreadlocks were forcibly shaved off by prison guards cannot sue the guards under a federal law to protect the religious rights of prisoners.

anglophone.title: In symbolic vote, Congress directs Trump to remove forces from Iran war
anglophone.excerpt: The measure to remove U.S. armed forces from hostilities with Iran does not require the president's signature, nor does it carry the force of law. But it reflects bipartisan frustration with the war.

anglophone.title: Congress passes the largest housing affordability bill in decades
anglophone.excerpt: An expansive bipartisan bill intended to bring down the cost of housing by boosting the supply of homes has passed both houses of Congress, and is headed to the president's desk for a signature.

anglophone.title: Is AI 'one big bubble'? Behind the tech sell-off
